title: After Enies Lobby: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #26, Unknown person #17 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #26, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Idiots, go mind your own business !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That might've been our first time

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Seeing you actually build a ship....!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: We've never seen you that Happy, Bro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wanted poster....!! I knew I'd get one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You can't stay with us anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't give me any of that crap!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: But I found you and fed you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Pants!? Who cares about pants...? Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: ... Give me back my pants, punk,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's the best pair I HAVE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Bring the pants to the shipwreck Island!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Don't let them see the pervert !!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #26, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: key exchange.
